title: Merge an adapter and verify parity
description: Fold a trained adapter into base weights for serving, then confirm the merged model matches the adapter-on-base reference.
body: Use when collapsing a LoRA adapter into the base to simplify serving. Do not assume merge is lossless or base-agnostic — merging onto the wrong revision or at the wrong scale shifts outputs. Actions: confirm the adapter's recorded base/tokenizer, merge at the trained scaling, then run a parity check comparing merged outputs to the runtime adapter-on-base on a reference set. Validation signals include a parity report with negligible output divergence and merge metadata naming the exact base. Risk boundary: a silently corrupted merge degrades every request; if parity fails, deny the merged artifact and serve the adapter at runtime instead while escalating.
